name: Reports - Commission Report
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Commission Report is designed to deliver calculated commissions for your staff based on sales made across a calendar month. Within Retail Express you can calculate your commission based on a number of variables, including a Commission Threshold, specific Product Types or Processed sales only."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The Commission Report is used to report on single Calendar Months only"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppgqfEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppgqfEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "inline", "float": "none", "name": "Commission Report1.JPG"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": ""}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/115000173893/Commission_Report1.JPG", "children": [{"text": "Click to view full size"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Using the Commission Report"}], "data-id": "using-the-commission-report"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To use the Commission Report:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Reports > Sales Reports > Commission ", "bold": true}, {"text": "Report", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Month ", "bold": true}, {"text": "and "}, {"text": "Year", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Filters ", "bold": true}, {"text": "as required (see below for more information on each filter)"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "View Help ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to see information on the Filters"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Search", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The results will be displayed"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "View Legend ", "bold": true}, {"text": "for information on the columns on the Results tab"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Print ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to print the report"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Export to Excel ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to download a copy of the report in a Microsoft Excel spreadsheet format"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/314-reports-commission-report#filters", "children": [{"text": "Search filters"}]}], "data-id": "search-filters"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The filters for the Commission Report are below in more detail."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To view information on the Filters from within Retail Express click the "}, {"text": "View Help ", "bold": true}, {"text": "button in the top right-hand corner."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphP0EAI.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphP0EAI.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "commissionreport.gif"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Filter", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Details", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Month and Year (mandatory)"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The date the sales were made "}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Filter by Processed Date"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select this option to include only sales that were Processed (fully paid) during the selected month/year"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "% Paid over Commission Threshold"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "(%OTC)"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Calculates the sales percentage paid as an extra"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Commission Threshold"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "(CT)"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The sales dollar value target for the period to be exceeded to qualify for a commission"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Bonus Threshold"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The quantity of bonus products required to be sold to earn the bonus amount e.g. if you have a sales target to sell 30 products to earn a bonus, enter 30"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Bonus Amount"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The dollar value of the additional Commission amount to be earned by selling the required quantity in the Bonus Threshold"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Warehouse (mandatory)"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Outlet (store location) to be included in the results"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Hold ctrl and click each Outlet to select multiple locations"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sales Product Types"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "Product Types"}, {"text": " selects the range of products to be included in the calculation of the Units Sold in the results"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Other Product Types"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Will display in the results in the Sales Values, separate to the Sales Product Types (for example if using Product Types to separate service-related products like "Labour" that shouldn't be included in the sales unit quantities)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Bonus Products"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Special Products"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Service Products"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "These fields are free text and accept Product ID's and SKU's separated by a comma."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Bonus Product - These are the Product ID/s or SKU/s that staff can target their sales towards to earn extra bonus per the Bonus Amount field."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Special Products - These are Product ID/s or SKU/s you can choose to enter related to 'Assembly' or 'Installation' (e.g. Assembly of a flat-pack product prior to delivery or installation and setup of a stereo)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Service Products - These are the Product ID/s or SKU/s you can choose to enter related to 'Free Services' (e.g. Free one month service for a new bike or Free jewellery cleaning)"}]}]}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-c7aecee4"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/314-reports-commission-report#results", "children": [{"text": "Results tab"}]}], "data-id": "results-tab"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "Results ", "bold": true}, {"text": "tab displays information on the sales and products sold for the selected month, along with a Projected Commission amount."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To view information on each of the columns from within Retail Express click the "}, {"text": "View Legend ", "bold": true}, {"text": "button in the top right-hand corner."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppgcPEAQ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppgcPEAQ.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "commissionreport_resultslegend.gif"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Column", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Details", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sales Person"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The staff member within Retail Express"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Modified Total"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "(MT)"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Calculation:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Gross Profit + (50% of Other Sales) + (Special Units x 60) + Service Units x 37.5)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Projected Modified Total"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "(PMT)"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The expected total for the month based on the calendar month and the current date. The calculation for this field is:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "(Modified Total/Day of Month) x Days in Month"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Projected Commission"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "(PC)"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The amount expected to be earned in Commission by the staff member."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The calculation for this field varies depending on whether the Projected Modified Total is above or below the Commission Threshold configured on the Filters tab, and uses the following fields :"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Projected Modified Total (PMT)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Commission Threshold (CT) - configured on Filters"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "% Paid over the Commission Threshold (%OTC) - configured on Filters"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Bonus $"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If Projected Modified Total is "}, {"text": "less than", "italic": true}, {"text": " the Commission Threshold:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "PC = 10% PMT + Bonus $"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If the Projected Modified Total is "}, {"text": "equal to or greater than ", "italic": true}, {"text": "the Commission Threshold:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "PC = 10% CT + %OTC of the"}, {"text": " amount over the threshold + ", "italic": true}, {"text": "Bonus $."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "				For example if the PMT was $1100 and the CT was $1000, %OTC would be calculated on $100."}]}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Gross Profit"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Gross profit across all products"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Units Sold"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The number of units sold of products with matching Product Types as selected in the "Sales Product Types" filter"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Special Units"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The number of units sold of products with codes entered in the the "Special Products" filter"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Other Sales"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Gross Profit of products sold with matching Product Types as selected in the "Other Product Types" filter"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Service Units"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The number of units sold of products with codes entered in the the "Service Products" filter"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Bonus Units"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The number of units sold of products with codes entered in the the "Bonus Products" filter"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Bonus $"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Bonus Amount commission earned (as configured on the Filters tab) if the Bonus Units value exceeds the value entered in the Bonus Threshold field"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Commission Threshold"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Commission Threshold as configured on the Filters Tab"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Annual Leave"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The "Days Off" field as configured in the "}, {"text": "User's account"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-606d2d89"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Want more information? Find related articles here:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Staff Sales Report"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Staff Sales Export"}]}]}]}]
